# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "your-vendor/your-project",
    "description": "Project with automated post-install and post-update scripts",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=7.4"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('storage/logs')) { mkdir('storage/logs', 0755, true); }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('storage/cache')) { mkdir('storage/cache', 0755, true); }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('public/assets')) { mkdir('public/assets', 0755, true); }\"",
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@php scripts/generate-config.php",
            "chmod -R 755 storage",
            "chmod -R 755 bootstrap/cache",
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php",
            "@php scripts/setup-database.php",
            "echo 'Installation completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php",
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php",
            "@php scripts/migrate-database.php",
            "chmod -R 755 storage",
            "chmod -R 755 bootstrap/cache",
            "echo 'Update completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "setup": [
            "@php scripts/setup-environment.php",
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php",
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php",
            "rm -rf storage/cache/*"
        ],
        "compile": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "setup": "Run complete setup process",
        "clear-cache": "Clear all application caches",
        "compile": "Compile application assets",
        "download-assets": "Download required assets from remote URLs"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "*": true
        }
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
